description.value: The entity you called to has grown more comfortable reaching back. You have learned to use those moments.

system.benefits: Once per long rest, you may spend 10 minutes in silent stillness and ask your patron for guidance. The GM provides a single piece of information the patron knows that is relevant to your current situation ex. where an enemy is, the nature of a magical effect, the weakness of a creature. Additionally, when you use your Pact Gift ability, you may choose to spend 2 Luck instead of the normal action cost to use it as a [Reaction] instead.

usage.text: Patron guidance once per long rest (10 minutes); Pact Gift as Reaction costs 2 Luck
